page.beranda.title: Experience the Beauty and Authenticity of Tamanan Hamlet
page.beranda.description: Tamanan is a hamlet in Kalasan, Sleman rich in tourism, cultural and UMKM potential. Managed by Lemah Asri, we present an authentic and sustainable village tourism experience.

page.lemahAsri.title: Lemah Asri Profile
section.profil.title: Tamanan Village
section.profil.description: Tamanan is a hamlet located in Kalasan, Sleman, Special Region of Yogyakarta. With its wealth of nature, culture, and human resources, Tamanan has developed into a community-based tourism destination managed by Lemah Asri.
